title: 羽ばたけコンドル！世界最強の空へ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As promised, El Condor Pasa shows up for training the following day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She's fearless, she's bold, she's El Condor Pasa! Having overcome her
injury, she makes her triumphant return to the ring!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello and good morning. You're awfully calm, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So I gotta know! What kind of extremo training are we doin' today?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Is it gonna be thirty laps at top speed?! Or maybe hill sprints until the
sun goes down?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Running around town while givin' you a piggyback ride doesn't sound
bad either!
choice_data_list:
How about we do some light jogging on dirt
today?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see, I see, I see! Some light joggin'—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, whaaat?! Sorry, did I hear you right just now? Trainer, could you
repeat that?!
choice_data_list:
How about we do some light jogging on dirt
today?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The exact same sentence—word-for-word! What are you, stuck on
repeat?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Why?! Why are you doin' this to me, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I am the Umamusume who will one day become the world's strongest racer! The condor who will rule over the skies of champions!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think I have even a second to waste on dillydallying on
the ground?!
choice_data_list: Fundamentals are important too, you know?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grr... Urghhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...I understand. I'll run—for now. But if you change your mind, tell me
right away, okay?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How am I supposed to soar the skies with this kind of normal training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her complaints, El Condor Pasa makes her way to the dirt
track and begins running.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Phew... I finished that light jog you wanted me to do, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Uh, they're fine... No pain at all in either leg.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, don't tell me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you made me do light training because you were worried
about my legs?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, no need to make a fuss! If I'm gonna prove myself as the
world's strongest racer, then we don't have time to worry about this
kinda stuff!
choice_data_list:
You can't become the world's strongest if you're
injured.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh. You're right about that, but... But!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm sad, shocked, even disappointed. I was really lookin' forward to your training program, you know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Could it... Could it be that you never actually believed in me from the
start?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did you think that fundamentals training was just right for a
loudmouth like El Condor Pasa?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I bet you don't even believe that I could become the world's strongest
racer, do you?!
choice_data_list:
No, I do want to prove that you're the
strongest!

No, I do want to prove that you're the
strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urk! S-such fiery eyes! That's the passion I know and love!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: B-but now I'm even more confused! If what you said is true, then what's this training for?!
choice_data_list:
It's to condition your body into becoming the
world's strongest racer!

It's to condition your body into becoming the
world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Condition my body?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa is still growing. If she pushes herself too much now,
there's a chance she might develop a chronic injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that's why I want her to do training that suits her
current strengths so that one day, when she's ready, she'll have a
body ready to truly become the world's strongest racer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...I see. I see, I see—I totally understand.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Um, actually, you lost me with all the lingo in the middle. But at the
very least...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I get that you're serious about training me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So... there's something I want to ask you. And I want you to put your
all into this answer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest racer—she flies across the turf at the speed of
light!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And her name is?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Correct! Bueno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You replied with zero hesitation, which means you really do believe in
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa flashes me a satisfied smile.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm... Why don't we do this again from the top?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Just wait riiight there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Here I go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Blam! The lightning-quick Umamusume who runs through storm and
squall! Her name—El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Also known as... your new trainee! She's here and reeeady to
ruuumble!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And on that note... Trainer, I'm looking forward to our new
partnership!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I took my first step towards soaring the skies with El Condor
Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, with that over, let's get back to training! Wanna run with me,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Picture it—beside the world's strongest Umamusume stands her
trainer, the world's strongest muscle behemoth! I think we could make
it work, don't you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Wait up, Trainer! Don't be like that! Come back! Why are you
running?!
